message:
chore: clippy fix in franken_evidence export + sync beads issue tracker

- franken_evidence/src/export.rs: Replace .map(|m| m.len()).unwrap_or(0)
  with the more idiomatic .map_or(0, |m| m.len()) per clippy::map_unwrap_or

- .beads/issues.jsonl: Sync issue tracker database with latest state,
  adding new issue entries and updating dependency/status metadata from
  recent work sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
